iotsitewise.assetmodel.transform.Express.Docs: The mathematical expression that defines the transformation function. You can specify up to 10 variables per expression. You can specify up to 10 functions per expression.   For more information, see [Quotas](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-sitewise/latest/userguide/quotas.html) in the *AWS IoT SiteWise User Guide*.

iotsitewise.assetmodel.transform.Variabl.Docs: The list of variables used in the expression.
